studies.title: New AI-Powered Learning Platform Released
studies.summary: A breakthrough in personalized education with AI tutoring becoming more accessible to students worldwide.
studies.fullDescription: A new AI-powered learning platform has been launched, promising to revolutionize personalized education. The platform uses adaptive algorithms to tailor content to each student's pace and learning style.

studies.title: Effective Study Techniques: The Pomodoro Method
studies.summary: Research confirms that 25-minute focused sessions improve retention and reduce burnout among students.
studies.fullDescription: A comprehensive study confirms the Pomodoro Method's effectiveness. Students who used 25-minute focused blocks showed 35% better retention and 40% lower burnout rates.

studies.title: University of Oxford Launches Free Online Courses
studies.summary: Thousands of courses now available for free, covering mathematics to philosophy.
studies.fullDescription: The University of Oxford has expanded its free online course catalog to over 2,000 courses. Topics range from advanced mathematics to humanities.

work.title: Remote Work Productivity Hits Record High
work.summary: Global survey shows remote workers are 13% more productive with proper time management tools.
work.fullDescription: A global survey of remote workers reveals productivity gains when using structured time management. Companies report 13% output increases.

work.title: Focus Time Rules: Setting Boundaries at Work
work.summary: Tech companies report 40% increase in output when implementing no-meeting time blocks.
work.fullDescription: Major tech firms have adopted focus hours where meetings are banned. Employees report 40% more deep work.

workout.title: High-Intensity Interval Training: Efficient Workouts
workout.summary: 20-minute focused workout sessions deliver same benefits as hour-long traditional exercise.
workout.fullDescription: HIIT continues to gain scientific backing. A 20-minute session can match 60 minutes of moderate cardio for cardiovascular benefits.

health.title: Sleep Quality Linked to Focus and Productivity
health.summary: Research shows 7–8 hours of sleep improves cognitive performance significantly.
health.fullDescription: Sleep scientists recommend 7–8 hours for optimal cognitive function. Poor sleep impairs focus, memory, and decision-making.

meditation.title: 10-Minute Meditation Boosts Focus
meditation.summary: Short daily sessions improve attention span and reduce stress.
meditation.fullDescription: Research shows that even 10 minutes of daily meditation significantly improves attention span and reduces stress levels.

wellness.title: Mindfulness Meditation Reduces Stress by 35%
wellness.summary: Clinical trials show daily meditation significantly improves mental health outcomes.
wellness.fullDescription: A meta-analysis confirms meditation's benefits. Daily practice reduces stress markers by 35%. Even 10 minutes helps.

creative.title: Creative Flow State: Unlocking Your Potential
creative.summary: Uninterrupted focus enables creative breakthroughs—artists report 5x more output.
creative.fullDescription: Creative professionals report 5x output during flow states. Key triggers: uninterrupted blocks, low stakes, and intrinsic motivation.

default.title: Productivity Tips for Busy Professionals
default.summary: Five evidence-based strategies to get more done in less time.
default.fullDescription: Time blocking, single-tasking, and strategic breaks top the list. Professionals report 30% efficiency gains.
